data.body: LANDING MODEL CHANGED on origin/main (ADR 0047): auto-lander + Autosubmit + FFO REMOVED. New: plain Gerrit Submit (POST /a/changes/<n>/submit) once LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1; Gerrit rebases-and-submits server-side; textual conflict -> rebase+re-push+re-Submit. NO land command, NO Autosubmit. Use this for Phase 6 landing (submit top of stack -> submits ancestors).
